caption: A man with a distinctive tall, greyish-blonde hairstyle and glasses wears a white dress shirt, a red bow tie, and suspenders. He is wearing black over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a black professional microphone in what appears to be a studio setting. Behind him, a wall features a logo that reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS" and a framed picture of a gold shield. A logo in the bottom left corner reads "PRESS TALK 101 PODCAST," and the text "PRESS TALK 101" appears on the right side of the screen. In the background, another person wearing a black shirt and a face mask is visible. Between the frames, the man remains in a similar pose, speaking into the microphone, while the person in the background shifts positions, eventually stepping closer and holding a smartphone.
